tunnels.name: Washburn Tunnel
tunnels.addr: Under Houston Ship Channel, Pasadena-Galena Park
tunnels.notes: Only underwater vehicle tunnel in TX. Free. Height strictly enforced — truck-height signs.

bridges.name: Houston Avenue Bridge (I-10)
bridges.notes: INFAMOUS strike bridge. Hit 70+ times in 2025 ($400k+ damages). Below TxDOT's 18'6" freight standard. Demo/reconstruction planned 2027.

bridges.name: Memorial Drive — MKT Trail Underpass
bridges.notes: Rail underpass. Floods in heavy rain. Low for box trucks.

bridges.name: Studemont Street Rail Underpass
bridges.notes: Heights neighborhood. Caution for moving trucks.
